ddls:
CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type (e.g., beforeAdd, beforeEdit, beforeQuery) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "is_system_event" INTEGER /* Indicates if the event is a system event (true) or user-triggered (false) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tables" (
  "table_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each table */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the table */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the table was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the table was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the table is currently active */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the data stored in the table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("table_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pages" (
  "page_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each page */,
  "page_name" TEXT /* Name of the page */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the page */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the page was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the page was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the page is currently active */,
  "access_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the page has been accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("page_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tabs" (
  "tab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tab */,
  "tab_name" TEXT /* Name of the tab */,
  "page_id" INTEGER /* ID of the page the tab belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tab */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tab was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tab was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tab is currently active */,
  "access_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tab has been accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is a default role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "page_id" INTEGER /* ID of the page accessed */,
  "table_id" INTEGER /* ID of the table accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was accessed */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the resource */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_table_id FOREIGN KEY ("table_id") REFERENCES tables ("table_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_page_id FOREIGN KEY ("page_id") REFERENCES pages ("page_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event log */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event triggered */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who triggered the event */,
  "trigger_date" TEXT /* Date when the event was triggered */,
  "success" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the event was successful */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message associated with the event (e.g., error message, success message) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user triggering the event */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to trigger the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role associated with the permission */,
  "table_id" INTEGER /* ID of the table associated with the permission */,
  "page_id" INTEGER /* ID of the page associated with the permission */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the role can view the resource */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the role can edit the resource */,
  "can_delete" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the role can delete the resource */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  "can_create" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the role can create new records */,
  "can_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the role can read records */,
  "can_write" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the role can write records */,
  "can_execute" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the role can execute actions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_page_id FOREIGN KEY ("page_id") REFERENCES pages ("page_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_table_id FOREIGN KEY ("table_id") REFERENCES tables ("table_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
